subcodes.first_line: O friends of Truth, raise up your hands in thanksgiving before the court of the All-Glorious Lord and say: O merciful God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حق دست شکرانه بساحت حضرت ذوالجلال بلند کنید و بگواید ای یزدان رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
